name: init
summary: Initialize the SDK singleton for the current process.
description:
Constructs the SDK, creates the MasterApp IPC transport, and wires a single-thread worker executor for transaction dispatch. Must be called before any other SDK API.

Takes identity and infrastructure configuration only — merchant appId, operator userId, host app version, and the IPC timeoutSecs. Per-transaction fields (amount, billingRefNo, invoiceNo) belong on each TransactionRequest.

Idempotent: a second call with any arguments returns the first-created instance. Binding to MasterApp is lazy — it happens per transaction, not at init time.

parameters.name: context
parameters.description: Any Context. The SDK retains context.applicationContext only.

parameters.name: appId
parameters.description: Merchant application identifier supplied by Pinelabs. Sent as Header.ApplicationId. Must be non-blank.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: Operator / user identifier. Sent as Header.UserId. Must be non-blank.

parameters.name: version
parameters.description: Host-app version string. Sent as Header.VersionNo. Must be non-blank.

parameters.name: timeoutSecs
parameters.description: Max seconds to wait for a MasterApp reply, covering the full bind → reply window. Range: 1..600.

returns.description: Initialized SDK handle. Thread-safe; use as a process-wide singleton.

errors.when: appId, userId, or version is blank, or timeoutSecs is outside 1..600.

notes: init does not bind to MasterApp or perform any I/O. Binding is lazy per transaction. Transport-related failures surface on doTransaction as TransportUnavailable.

examples.code:
import com.pinelabs.sdk.PinelabsSdk

val sdk = PinelabsSdk.init(
    context     = applicationContext,
    appId       = "1001",
    userId      = "operator-01",
    version     = "1.0",
    timeoutSecs = 60,
)

signatures.signature: fun PinelabsSdk.Companion.init(context: Context, appId: String, userId: String, version: String, timeoutSecs: Int = 60): PinelabsSdk
static PinelabsSdk PinelabsSdk.init(Context context, String appId, String userId, String version, int timeoutSecs)
